patient_summary: 73-year-old female (Olivia) with documented diagnosis of "Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (CMS/HCC) (CMS/HCC)". Medication refill requests for Atorvastatin (CVS) are documented. Recent labs include an elevated glucose 199 (01/11/2021), BMP abnormalities (Sodium 134 L, Chloride 97 L, BUN 37 H, Creatinine 1.1 H, GFR 50 A on 01/11/2021), LFTs within provided ranges (Alkaline Phosphatase 58; AST 8 L; ALT 10 on 01/08/2021), and lipid panel with HDL 38 L on 07/17/2020. Functional limitations noted: difficulty walking/climbing stairs, dressing/bathing, and doing errands alone (01/05/2021). Care team includes PCP Hershey CL, endocrinology, cardiology, surgery, oncology, and nephrology consultants. Additional history includes MRSA of the right breast (09/03/2020) and prior COVID-19 with comment 'recovered'. Document contains conflicting DOB and phone entries preserved in conflicts.
